code: import axios from"axios";import{useFormik}from"formik";import{useCookies}from"react-cookie";import{useNavigate}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export function UserLogin(){let navigate=useNavigate();const[cookies,setCookies,removeCookie]=useCookies('user-id');const formik=useFormik({initialValues:{UserId:'',Password:''},onSubmit:user=>{axios.get('http://127.0.0.1:3030/get-users').then(response=>{var data=response.data.find(item=>item.UserId===user.UserId);if(data){if(data.Password===user.Password){setCookies('user-id',user.UserId);navigate('/user-dashboard');}else{navigate('/user-error');}}else{navigate('/user-error');}});}});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"d-flex justify-content-center align-items-center",style:{height:'60vh'},children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"w-25",onSubmit:formik.handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"text-center bi bi-people-fill",children:" User Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("dl",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("dt",{children:"User Id"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("dd",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",name:"UserId",onChange:formik.handleChange,className:"form-control"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("dt",{children:"Password"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("dd",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",name:"Password",onChange:formik.handleChange,className:"form-control"})})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"btn btn-warning w-100",children:"Login"})]})});}
